headline: AutoZone Says Winter Storms Hurt Sales
summary: The car-parts retailer said net sales rose 8.1% to $4.27 billion for its 12 weeks ended Feb. 14. Analysts polled by FactSet had forecast sales of $4.31 billion.

raw.headline: AutoZone Says Winter Storms Hurt Sales
raw.summary: The car-parts retailer said net sales rose 8.1% to $4.27 billion for its 12 weeks ended Feb. 14. Analysts polled by FactSet had forecast sales of $4.31 billion.

headline: Nvidia Tumbles As War Fears Escalate; Is Nvidia A Sell Now?
summary: As fears of the conflict between the U.S. and Iran took deeper root Tuesday, Nvidia stock tumbled, falling close to a key level.  Is Nvidia stock a buy or sell now?  The stock did not get a positive reaction to earnings though the company exceeded expectations as posted by FactSet.

headline: Best Buy Forecasts Tepid Growth as Consumers Focus on Value
summary: Best Buy projected weak growth for the year ahead as it expects consumers to continue hunting for value, hurting demand for its consumer electronics.

headline: The Stock Market Is Selling Off Again. It’s Broad This Time.
summary: Take two of the stock market’s selloff is gathering pace–and it’s broad.  Just 38 stocks are gaining ahead of the market open and most of those are energy or defense companies, according to FactSet data, while 384 are falling.

raw.headline: The Stock Market Is Selling Off Again. It’s Broad This Time.
